channel.title: FAQ on YWallet
channel.description: Recent content in FAQ on YWallet

item.title: Why is the synchronization so slow?
item.description: Because of the SPAM, your synchronization time is 100 times slower. Zcash used to offer a fix fee for all shielded transactions regardless of their sizes: 0.00001 ZEC. That’s very cheap. One day, someone started making transactions with 1000s of inputs/outputs for next to nothing. Thus, pretty much all the blocks got filled with garbage (most likely, it’s shielded - we do not know what is inside). Eventually, fees were raised but that took one year, during which the SPAM went uncontrolled.

item.title: Why YWallet does not find my funds?
item.description: I have the right seed phrase but YWallet does not show the right balance. Where are the rest of my funds? Funds are located at addresses that derived from the seed phrase, but it is not a one to one mapping. In fact, from a given seed phrase, you have as many addresses as you want. You need to also know the derivation path. seed phrase + derivation path gives you a secret key and therefore an address.
